title: task
description: Rust lichen-oscore lib.rs has 'ponytail: empty AAD for now, proper AAD structure in RFC 8613 Section 5.4' comment in protect_request. Zephyr oscore.c has full build_oscore_aad implementation. Port the RFC 8613 Section 5.4 AAD structure to Rust for protocol compliance.
close_reason: Implemented RFC 8613 Section 5.4 AAD structure in Rust OSCORE: added build_aad_cbor() function matching Zephyr oscore.c build_oscore_aad(). Updated protect_request(), unprotect_request(), unprotect_response() to use proper AAD. Added protect_response() function for correct response AAD handling. All 17 tests pass.
